situationSummary: Substation A has NOT recovered after 5 minutes. Cascade confirmed: Pump Station 7 flow at 68% (was 100%). Tower Central signal degraded to 95% (battery backup active, 2h remaining). Shadow link analysis shows treatment_plant will be impacted within 15 minutes. Hospital Cumberland on backup generator (72h reserve). Reservoir Alpha at 82% and rising — approaching 95% overflow threshold.
proposedAction: 1. Isolate Pump Station 7 from Substation A fault. 2. Open reservoir preemptive release gate to reduce flood risk. 3. Activate backup water supply route to hospital. 4. Notify National Grid ESO for Sub A restoration priority.
regulatoryBasis: Civil Contingencies Act 2004, Section 2. Flood and Water Management Act 2010, Section 14. Environment Agency operational protocol EA-OP-372.

notes: Cascade path confirmed by 3 independent shadow links
Reservoir overflow prediction based on rainfall extrapolation (±15 min)
Hospital backup generator capacity verified by BMS data
